title: Conquest of Dragons
description: Live an unforgettable experience in the latest version of Minecraft. A world conquered by dragons!!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Conquest_of_Dragons/BH_COD_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/conquest-of-dragons) version.** ## Dragons have arrived in the latest version of Minecraft, now you can live an unforgettable experience in a world conquered by fearsome dragons. Will you be able to kill them? Or do you prefer to tame them and use them to travel? Main features: - Hostile and tameable dragons have been incorporated. - More than 100 biomes have been added. - 100 fantastic animals will be able to inhabit the world. - New structures and dungeons. - A lot more fun! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Conquest_of_Dragons/BH_COD_summary.webp) This impressive new modpack brings mythological creatures to life, among which dragons stand out. You will live an experience never seen before in Minecraft 1.20.1! All mods are related to the main theme, improving the adventure, combat and exploration of the games drastically. If you are a true lover of mythology, without a doubt, this modpack is ideal for you. 🐉 Conquest of Dragons is a new renewed modpack with the famous Ice and Fire, available for the most recent version of Minecraft, the amazing 1.20.1. 👑 Made up of more than one hundred mods, you will live an unbeatable game experience, with mods such as AmbientSounds, Ambient Environment, AttributeFix, Better Animations Collection, Dynamic Trees, Dynamic Lights, Serene Seasons or Sound Physics Remastered, and these are just some of the mods that will improve the experience, but there is much more... ⚜️ It also adds mods perfectly compatible with Ice and Fire, such as Artifacts, ideal to get some additional powers before fighting against the fearsome dragons! 🏔️ You will discover new biomes and faunas in all parts of the world, including the oceans, with Aquaculture 2 or the mythical Biomes O' Plenty, which changes everything. 🔗 Dragons, mythology, and also some more archeology, with Better Archeology you will be able to live what it is really like to be an archeologist... 🔎 Objectives are fundamental in any game, that's why Better Advancements has been added, so you'll always have something to do. 🧟‍♂️ You will also have to conquer new territories, such as The Twilight Forest dimension or defeat much more powerful bosses, thanks to Progressive Bosses. 💬 It's a perfect modpack for multiplayer games, and that's why we've added a lot of mods for you to enjoy with your friends! For example, Simple Voice Chat, Emojiful or the mythical Security Craft. 😎 Don't forget to activate the shaders! We have added what we consider to be the best ones today, the famous Complementary Shaders - Unbound. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Conquest_of_Dragons/BH_COD_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Conquest_of_Dragons/BH_COD_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v8DLJQRH/images/294ec745618af687bd7bf578cafa4562a0dd0684.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v8DLJQRH/images/0e9843d86ffd2db327a7eafce9140c07718c8a30.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v8DLJQRH/images/dd5822452d3a4f0566470d73c429328fec6c5b68.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
